steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student claims The Horse Fair marks a significant change in Bonheur's artistic development. The correct quotation must directly show that The Horse Fair divided her career — before versus after — not merely praise the painting or note its influence.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — "The paintings that Bonheur produced before The Horse Fair can be thought of as belonging to her earlier style, to which she never returned.": explicitly states a before/after shift in style caused by the painting. This directly supports the claim of a significant change. ✓
  • Choice B — "Of all Bonheur's paintings, none so clearly represents her abilities and ideas as The Horse Fair.": says the painting is her best representative work, not that it changed her style. No contrast between before and after. ✗
  • Choice C — "The Horse Fair has been analyzed extensively since it was first exhibited, as no two viewers seem to agree about exactly what the painting means.": about interpretive disagreement among viewers, not about Bonheur's artistic development. ✗
  • Choice D — "Although Bonheur was clearly influenced by other artists of her time, she was also an artist ahead of her time, as The Horse Fair demonstrates.": about external influences and Bonheur's forward-looking quality, not a shift in her own style. ✗
That confirms A is correct.
